title: roasted australian dish roast
description: roasted, bouncy, cozy australian dish featuring colatura, render-fat, gluten-free-friendly. serve with roasted root vegetables.
instructions: season the lamb shoulder with salt, black pepper, and rosemary.
heat the olive oil in a large dutch oven over medium-high heat. sear the lamb shoulder on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side. remove the lamb from the pot and set it aside.
add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
add the chopped onion, carrots, and potatoes to the pot. cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
add the rendered lamb fat to the pot and stir to combine.
return the lamb shoulder to the pot and make sure it's mostly covered with the vegetables and fat.
cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
roast the lamb for 2-3 hours, or until it's tender and falling apart.
remove the pot from the oven and let it cool for 10-15 minutes.
shred the lamb with two forks and serve it with the roasted vegetables and a drizzle of colatura.
